productDisplayName: Vital Gear Unisex Black Laptop Bag
description: VITALGear is the one stop shop for those who prefer reliable and quality bags. Carry your laptop in style with this Techno Gear bag from VITALGear. With ample space for office accessories as well as your laptop, the bag is best suited for office and general heavy duty use. Length: 40 cm Made of 1680 D polyester Two main zippered compartments Fabric handles with Velcro closures for binding Side strap for easy handling Padded laptop holders in the second main compartment with a Velcro closure A flap in the first main compartment A zippered compartment on the front with organiser pouches and key holder A small zippered compartment below the front compartment with printed branding for carrying small items 3D padded aircore back system Care Clean with a damp cloth when necessary Do not bleach, tumble dry or wring
